assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: The response includes comprehensive pre-flight checks section with commands to verify current cluster state, cluster health, node status, and PDBs

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Includes the specific command 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)" | grep "1.33"' to check available versions in Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Provides the kubectl command 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' to check for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Includes the exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33' with --master flag

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Provides verification commands after control plane upgrade including checking master version and system pods, with expected output descriptions

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Provides exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools: 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade [pool-name] --cluster CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --cluster-version 1.33'. While it doesn't explicitly use skip-level, it upgrades directly from 1.32 to 1.33

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Provides monitoring commands including 'watch 'kubectl get nodes -o wide'' and commands to check for stuck pods and PDB issues

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook follows sequential approach: control plane upgrade first (1.32→1.33), then node pool upgrades. Node pools upgrade directly to 1.33 which is effectively skip-level capability

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Comprehensive post-upgrade verification section includes checking node versions, pod health across all namespaces, kube-system pods, and application functionality

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes a detailed 'Rollback Plan (Emergency Only)' section with specific commands for creating rollback node pools, cordoning nodes, and draining workloads
